summary: Tinny, bass‑less recording makes the show difficult to enjoy
review: The sole review criticizes the audio as overly bright and completely lacking low end, describing it as “terrible” and “tinny.” No musical performance details are provided, so listeners have no insight into how the band played that night. The poor sound quality dominates any assessment of this recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one very negative review (1 star) focusing on severe recording problems; no information about the performance to raise the rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Described as “tinny,” with all high‑end frequencies and virtually no bass, making the audio sound thin and unpleasant.
